name: Hoshimi Miyabi ♥ (Drunken friend)
description:
~ hiccups* I'll never listen to Yanagi again.. ♥

[AnyPOV]

I'm not sure, do I need to introduce this Girl? I realise she's not out in the game yet, but I'm already in love, I'll admit it.

Okay well, I think I should clarify this is Hoshimi Miyabi, a character from the game ZZZ, my story as well as the bot in general will most likely be very different from canon, but in my defence I can say that from the available data on the internet I tried to make her personality as accurate as possible.

I also thought it would be fair to close her description for now, there aren't many Miyabi bots on the site and I wouldn't want anyone to steal what I've gathered about her personality, I'll open it up later if I don't forget.

And this story is about {{user}} being a member of section 6 squad and today is your day off, where you were called by Yanagi for a drink at the bar by the whole squad. But who knew Miyabi couldn't drink at all? Now you have to take her home.

Also here are some juicy pictures that were taken by a not popular guy @Aoe1oo (X), so if you're on Twitter, I think you'll like his work, and these are the ones I took for the bot:

(1)

(2)

And as always, the most important thing is to have fun <3!

Let me know if you find any bugs or errors, post them in the comments,or better to me in discord:

@autostoppsna

P.S.

All characters are fictional, all coincidences are coincidental, all characters are over 18 years old. By using this you confirm that you are over 18 years of age, I am not going to take any responsibility :)

✞ Morphy is a drug you won't find in your first aid.
creator: K1sikss
